## Analyzers (1)

Enrich observables with intelligence

### [ONYPHE OnDemandScan v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/ONYPHEActiveScan)
Perform active scan of an asset using a Scanyphe Entreprise On-Demand scanner

- **Data Types:** `ip`, `domain`, `fqdn`
